scans.name: Golden Cross (50/200 EMA)
scans.clause: ( cash ( latest ema( close, 50 ) > latest ema( close, 200 ) and 1 day ago ema( close, 50 ) <= 1 day ago ema( close, 200 ) ) )

scans.name: MACD Bullish Crossover
scans.clause: ( cash ( latest macd( 12, 26, 9 ) > latest macd signal( 12, 26, 9 ) and 1 day ago macd( 12, 26, 9 ) <= 1 day ago macd signal( 12, 26, 9 ) ) )

scans.name: Volume 3x Spike
scans.clause: ( cash ( latest volume >= 1 day ago sma( volume, 20 ) * 3 ) )

scans.name: Minervini Trend Template
scans.clause: ( cash ( latest close > 30 and latest ema( close, 200 ) > 1 month ago ema( close, 200 ) and latest close > latest ema( close, 200 ) and latest close > latest ema( close, 150 ) and latest close > latest ema( close, 50 ) and latest ema( close, 50 ) > latest ema( close, 150 ) and latest ema( close, 150 ) > latest ema( close, 200 ) ) )

scans.name: Near 52W High
scans.clause: ( cash ( latest close >= latest max( 252, latest high ) * 0.98 ) )
